## Description

<!-- What does this PR do? -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] New skill
- [ ] New MCP tool
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## WCAG Criteria

<!-- If applicable, which WCAG success criteria does this change relate to? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`) — if the change affects a published package
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project (`pnpm check`)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors (`pnpm check-types`)
